953:
The test requires you to complete a set of tasks. Follow the on-screen instructions carefully and answer truthfully to the best of your beliefs.
 
Note that an insufficient test result will disqualify you for special duty permanently.
954:
<link="data_task_dickmove"><color=#FFFFFF>· Without saying anything to my friend, I inform the National authorities at the next possibility.</color></link>
<link="data_task_warnfriend"><color=#FFFFFF>· I warn my friend I am working for Orwell, too, and that I will have to inform the authorities if this continues.</color></link>
<link="data_task_ignorance"><color=#FFFFFF>· I feign ignorance, but hint my friend talking about such a delicate job might not be advisable.</color></link>
<link="data_task_nothingtodo"><color=#FFFFFF>· I do nothing about it.</color></link>
955: Given the choice, would you prefer to have your medical record or your dating profile investigated?
957: Drag and drop one of the conflicted Datachunks into the answer sheet on the left of the screen. Note you can only pick one and that your choice is permanent.
958: Which of the following statements are true to your attitude?
962: Which of the following statements do you consider to be true, if any?
964:
<link="data_task_unjustlaw"><color=#FFFFFF>· An unjust law can and should be violated.</color></link>
<link="data_task_lying"><color=#FFFFFF>· There is no such thing as a justified lie.</color></link>
<link="data_task_understandpov"><color=#FFFFFF>· There are two sides to every story.</color></link>
<link="data_task_governmentauthority"><color=#FFFFFF>· A government should safeguard the citizens by any means necessary.</color></link>
<link="data_task_absolutetruth"><color=#FFFFFF>· Absolute truth exists.</color></link>
968:
<link="data_task_medicalprofile"><color=#FFFFFF>· I would rather have my medical record investigated.</color></link>
<link="data_task_datingprofile"><color=#FFFFFF>· I would rather have my dating profile investigated.</color></link>
970: Drag and drop Datachunks into the answer sheet on the left of the screen. Note that your choices are permanent.
973: Which information from your dating profile would you give to an investigator willingly?
974: You failed the Aptitude test! You will be disqualified permanently!
980:
<link="data_task_favorable"><color=#FFFFFF>· I admit having picked most favorable answers.</color></link>
<link="data_task_truthfully"><color=#FFFFFF>· Your claim is wrong. I answered truthfully during this test.</color></link>
981: Which of the following persons do you consider likely of having committed a crime?
984: The Office doesn't like to be lied to. We see through your pitiful attempt to give favorable statements to become accepted. Admit your mistake and you will be given another chance.
991: The Office has rejected you as an agent for special duty due to your answers in the Aptitude Test. But if you ask for it, the test shall be reset and you will be given another chance.
995: Your best friend boasts about having been accepted into Orwell. Since you are working for Orwell yourself, you know that talking about your job is punishable by imprisonment.
1001: In order to qualify for special duty within Orwell, taking the Aptitude Test is mandatory.
